name: StarTrack Fixed Price Premium / Fixed Price Airlock

spec.doc: StarTrack Label Specifications - Modify Your Own System (MOS) v9

rules.title: Fixed price services are single-item consignments
rules.description: Fixed price services with fixed weight limits must have exactly one item per consignment, so the QR consignment quantity must be 1.

messages.pass: Consignment quantity is 1, as required for fixed price services.
messages.fail: Consignment quantity is {actual}. Fixed price services must consign a single item.

rules.title: Unit type permitted for fixed price services
rules.description: Pallets and skids are not permitted unit types for FPP/FPA products.
